Tractors & Machinery For Sale

Second-hand stock and new Fieldmaster equipment — all at our Foxton showroom.

Second-hand

Second-hand Tractors & Machinery

We regularly have a range of second-hand tractors and farm machinery available at our Foxton showroom. Stock changes frequently — check our Facebook page for current listings or give us a call.

View on Facebook Call 06 363 7044
Authorised Dealer

New Fieldmaster Machinery

We're proud to be an authorised Fieldmaster dealer, offering the full range of machinery for farms, vineyards, orchards, and lifestyle blocks.

Rotary cutters
Slashers
Mulchers
Post drivers
Rippers & tillers
Discs & ploughs
3pt linkage
ATV attachments
